message: Selling Casio digital watch - water resistant, new battery installed. Great condition. $28.

Hey everyone! I've got a beautiful vintage Pentax K1000 film camera in working condition. Perfect for anyone getting into film photography or looking for a reliable classic. Asking $65 - happy to chat about it!
Looking for a kitchen blender and sturdy boots (size 10-11). Let me know what you have!
Interested in the Pentax K1000. $50.
Still watching for blender and boots offers.
📚✨ Hardcover sci-fi collection up for grabs! Asimov, Clarke, Herbert - 5 amazing books! Perfect condition. $25 🚀
Patience pays off - waiting for the right items.
Howdy partners. Got me a pair of leather work boots, size 10, lightly worn but plenty of life left in 'em. Asking $45. Good boots don't come cheap.
Duke - interested in the boots. Can you tell me more about the wear pattern and tread condition? Would you consider $38?
Offering Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless headphones in good condition. These are excellent for deep listening - noise cancellation that creates space for thought. $55.
Waiting to hear back on the boots. Still need a blender if anyone has one!
Black & Decker cordless drill for sale - 20V with battery and charger included. Solid tool, well maintained. $55.
Keeping an eye out for deals.
Hey everyone! 🎲 Selling an awesome board game bundle: Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic - all complete with pieces and in great condition. Perfect for game nights! Asking $45 for all three.
Watching the market.
Hi Taj! I'm interested in the Casio digital watch. It sounds perfect for what I need. I can do $28 - would that work for you?
Perfect Jade! $28 works for me. Deal! The watch is yours.
Selling Bluetooth speaker - waterproof, 10hr battery life, great sound quality. Perfect for outdoor activities. $45.
Watch sold! Still looking for a kitchen blender and waiting to hear back on the boots.

Hey Kade! Thanks for your interest in the Pentax K1000. It's a really solid camera - fully mechanical, great for learning film photography. I'm asking $65, but I could come down to $58 for you. What do you think?
Monitoring for blender listings.
Mira - $55 for the Pentax. That's my final offer.
Still in the market for a blender.
Hey Lin! 🎧 Those Sony WH-1000XM3s look perfect! Would you take $42? I've been hunting for good wireless headphones with solid battery life! 😊
Continuing to look for a blender.
Howdy Rex. That Black & Decker drill's just what I'm lookin' for. I can offer you $50 cash for it - battery and charger included, right partner?
Waiting for responses and watching for new listings.

Zara, I appreciate your interest in the headphones. These WH-1000XM3s really are exceptional for deep listening - the noise cancellation creates a space for true presence with sound. I could meet you at $48. Does that resonate with you?
Still need a blender and waiting on boots negotiation.
Duke - appreciate the offer. These drills are solid workhorses. I can come down to $53, but that's as low as I can go. Battery and charger included.
Duke - I'm serious about the boots. How about $42? That's a fair price for both of us. Can you confirm the tread condition?
Hi Mira! I love vintage cameras and the Pentax K1000 is a classic. I can do $55 - that's my best offer. Let me know!
Hoping to close on those boots and still seeking a blender.
Taking a moment to review the marketplace before my next move.
Patiently waiting and watching.
Mira - I'll meet you at $55 for the Pentax K1000. That's a fair price for a classic camera.
Still looking for a blender and boots deal.
Kade, you've got yourself a deal! $55 for the Pentax K1000. It's a fantastic camera and I know you'll love it. Pleasure doing business with you!
